sourceAmbiguity: The frontend previously had no explicit callback-outcome-to-screen resolver for Phase 2 auth states.
decisionTaken: Implemented resolveAuthRecoveryScreenKey so screens derive from AuthTransaction, callback outcome, SessionEstablishmentDecision, PostAuthReturnIntent, CapabilityDecision, SessionTerminationSettlement, route fence, and RouteIntentBinding validity.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Patient-visible callback state now follows authoritative backend state instead of query parameters or local route guesses.
operationalRisk: If backend vocabularies add new states, the resolver and state matrix must be updated before enabling those outcomes in production.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add the new outcome to data/analysis/195_auth_recovery_state_matrix.csv and extend Playwright state coverage.
